---
description: Documentation Guidelines
---
# Documentation Guidelines
## Code Documentation
- Add documentation comments to all public APIs
- Include parameter types and descriptions
- Document return values ​​and possible errors
- Provide usage examples
## API Documentation
- Document all interface endpoints
- Include request/response examples
- List all possible status codes
- Document authentication requirements
## README Updates
- Update the README when adding features
- Include installation instructions
- Provide a quick start guide
- List configuration options
## Architecture Documentation
- Document design decisions
- Create architecture diagrams
- Explain data flow
- Document integration points
## Formatting Requirements
- Use Markdown format
- Include code examples
- Link to relevant documentation
- Keep documentation up-to-date
